array.string: cd "$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon" || exit 1; mkdir -p logs; source .venv/bin/activate || exit 1; export PYTHONPATH="$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon"; export DB_PATH="$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon/data/openclaw_real.db"; export OCLAW_DB_PATH="$DB_PATH"; exec python -u bots/spec_executor_min_v1.py >> logs/spec_executor_min_v1.out 2>> logs/spec_executor_min_v1.err
